description: Dashboard operativo de la sonda HTTP sintetica QoE respaldado por qoe_http_check y qoe_probe_run.

panels.description: Disponibilidad promedio en el rango y filtros actuales.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value then 100.0 else 0.0 }))
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> mean()

panels.title: Disponibilidad

panels.description: Suma del ultimo failure_count de qoe_probe_run para las sondas seleccionadas.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -30m, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_probe_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "failure_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> sum()

panels.title: Fallas en la ultima ejecucion

panels.description: Ultimo resultado de escritura hacia InfluxDB de las sondas seleccionadas. Verde significa que todas escribieron correctamente.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -30m, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_probe_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "write_succeeded")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value then 1.0 else 0.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> min()

panels.title: Estado de escritura en InfluxDB

panels.description: Tendencia de disponibilidad por servicio a partir del campo booleano available.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value then 100.0 else 0.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["service"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Disponibilidad por servicio

panels.description: Latencia end-to-end promedio por servicio a partir de time_total_ms.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "time_total_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["service"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Latencia total por servicio

panels.description: Ultimo estado por endpoint, incluyendo IP remota y URL efectiva, para identificar que servicio esta fallando ahora.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -30m, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /available|http_status|time_total_ms|error_class|curl_exit_code|remote_ip|effective_url/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id", "site", "environment", "service", "endpoint_name", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["probe_id", "site", "environment", "service", "endpoint_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> keep(columns: ["probe_id", "site", "environment", "service", "endpoint_name", "available", "http_status", "time_total_ms", "remote_ip", "effective_url", "error_class", "curl_exit_code"])
  |> sort(columns: ["service", "endpoint_name"])

panels.title: IP de consulta y estado actual

panels.description: Conteo de fallas por ejecucion desde qoe_probe_run.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_probe_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "failure_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Conteo de fallas de la sonda

panels.description: Tendencia de duracion de ejecucion de la sonda desde qoe_probe_run. Los picos suelen indicar endpoints lentos o problemas de conectividad local.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_probe_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "run_duration_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Duracion de ejecucion de la sonda

panels.description: Variabilidad de la latencia entre muestras usando la desviacion estandar de time_starttransfer_ms. Es un proxy HTTP, no jitter de red real.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "time_starttransfer_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["service"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: stddev, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Jitter proxy HTTP

panels.description: Velocidad de bajada aproximada del GET de curl calculada con size_download_bytes y time_total_ms. No equivale a una prueba de velocidad real.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /size_download_bytes|time_total_ms/)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "service", "endpoint_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, service: r.service, endpoint_name: r.endpoint_name, _field: "approx_download_mbps", _value: if exists r.time_total_ms and exists r.size_download_bytes and float(v: r.time_total_ms) > 0.0 then (float(v: r.size_download_bytes) * 8.0 / (float(v: r.time_total_ms) / 1000.0)) / 1000000.0 else 0.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["service"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Velocidad de bajada aproximada

panels.description: Desglose promedio de DNS, TCP, TLS, TTFB y tiempo total. Filtra por servicio para una lectura mas clara.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /time_namelookup_ms|time_connect_ms|time_appconnect_ms|time_starttransfer_ms|time_total_ms/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["service", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Desglose DNS, TCP, TLS, TTFB y total

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "environment", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check", start: -30d)
list.label: Entorno
list.name: environment
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "environment", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check", start: -30d)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "site", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/, start: -30d)
list.label: Sitio
list.name: site
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "site", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/, start: -30d)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "probe_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/, start: -30d)
list.label: Sonda
list.name: probe_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "probe_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/, start: -30d)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "service", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/, start: -30d)
list.label: Servicio
list.name: service
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "service", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/, start: -30d)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "endpoint_name", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/ and r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/, start: -30d)
list.label: Endpoint
list.name: endpoint_name
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "endpoint_name", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/ and r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/, start: -30d)

title: Resumen HTTP QoE de CX-Radar
